title: B.Pharma Jobs 2026 – Project Coordinator
shortInfo: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Project Coordinator post for candidates with B.Sc/ B.Pharm along with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research, and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 08 June 2026 at ACTREC Official Website.

basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Project Coordinator post for candidates with B.Sc/ B.Pharm along with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research, and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 08 June 2026 at ACTREC Official Website.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: What is the post name for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Project Coordinator at the Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Coordinator position.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 June 2026.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc/ B.Pharm degree with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 25 years and 35 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 45,000 per month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: What is the selection process for ACTREC Project Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Where is the ACTREC located?
faq.answer: ACTREC is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 410210.
